Ticket #1042 — Shipping delay on order #58821

Customer: My order #58821 was supposed to arrive on June 2 but tracking still
shows "label created." It has been 9 days since I placed the order.

Support: I'm sorry for the delay. Order #58821 shipped from our Reno
warehouse on June 1 but was held at the carrier's regional hub due to a
storm. I've issued a $10 shipping credit to your account and the package is
now scheduled to arrive by June 6.
